programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: With his considerable production of more than 6,000 works, Auguste Renoir took part in the emergence of the impressionist movement even if he were to distance himself from it later to assert a more personal style. This visit begins with his most famous masterpiece, the “Ball at the Moulin de la Galette”. You will also rediscover the “Dance in the City” and the “Piano Lesson” exposed at the Joslyn art museum as well as “Claude Renoir in Clown Costume”, a portrait of his son who was later to become one of France’s greatest film directors exposed at the Orangerie Museum in France Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Wim Delvoye" at the Royal Museum of Fine Arts of Belgium in Brussels. This exhibition tries to represent the works of the artist Wim Delvoye as well as possible. You will be able to observe emblematic works of the artist such as "the tattooed pig".

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, generalement considere comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu recemment octogenaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace legendaire. Ce film revèle des interviews intimes et inedites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le realisateur Phil Grabsky a beneficie d’un accès privilegie pour celebrer sur grand ecran ce genie creatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: The Real Thing - Real Life in a Copycat World
programme.desc: Sixty Eiffel towers, a dozen of Great Pyramids of Giza, thirty leaning towers of Pisa, over eighty copies of the White House… Architecture doppelgangers are multiplying all over the world. Between lucrative investments, architectural piracy, and modern tourism, each of these places expresses an aspect of how our planet is being transformed through globalization. Do these places have something in common? How different are they from copies of the past? Are they more than just copies?

programme.title: Art Poster in Paris Streets
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, illustrated posters turned Paris into an open-air museum. From Cheret to Toulouse-Lautrec, artists and audiences met in the streets. This film explores this graphic revolution and its impact on society and modernity.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Bernard Matussière, fashion and art photographer. He has photographed the biggest stars and made memorable advertising campaigns that have marked a generation. He started photography at a very young age, and today he will tell us what made him become a photographer, his life, his career.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Lissa Rivera is a Brooklyn-based photographer whose work has received numerous awards and accolades and has been exhibited internationally. Lissas latest project looks at photographys connection to identity on a personal level, focusing on her domestic partner as her muse. Rivera was chosen as a "Woman to Watch" for the biennial exhibition at the National Museum of Women in the Arts.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will find Remy Pagart in his warehouse in Lille. This artist will be one of the 120 exhibitors of « Expo4Art », a contemporary art fair. We will follow him throughout this particular day and we will accompany him in his preparations for this event which is important for him and many other artists.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: LÉcole darchitecture de Porto, conçue par Álvaro Siza, reflète son approche minimaliste et respectueuse du contexte environnant. Inauguree en 1993, lecole sintègre harmonieusement dans le paysage, jouant sur des volumes simples et une lumière naturelle omnipresente. Siza a utilise des materiaux modestes comme le beton blanc, conferant à lensemble une sobriete elegante. Les espaces sont conçus pour encourager linteraction entre les etudiants et les enseignants, favorisant ainsi un environnement dapprentissage ouvert et fluide. Ce bâtiment incarne parfaitement la philosophie architecturale de Siza, où fonction et poesie se rencontrent.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The city of Boulogne Billancourt experienced rapid development in the interwar period. Industrialists, filmmakers, architects, painters and sculptors test their creativity there. It is this impetus that the Museum of the 1930s would have liked to transcribe, created a collection of works of art from this period, first constituted by purchases in galleries, flea markets or auction houses, then mainly by donations. More than 1,500 sculptures, 800 paintings, 300 pieces of furniture… A heterogeneous whole, testimony of an era and a place in which the artistic excitement unfolds, and opens the way to a number of creative adventures of the 20th century.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde at the Musee Maillol
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition "Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde" at the Musee Maillol. This exhibition shows how Giacometti evolved from style to style. It tells his story from the first busts he sculpted at the age of 13, to the realization of large-scale sculptures towards the end of his life.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Spencer Tunick, an American visual photographer. He is known for his photographic compositions featuring hundreds of volunteers, men and women, posing nude, mostly in urban settings. He does not define himself as a photographer, but as a creator of installations, the photos being only the representation of his works.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux stars des annees 70, le crooner cool Tony Christie et la royaute pop Jimmy Osmond, sont accompagnes des experts Catherine Southon et Margie Cooper. Partant de la ville de Loughborough, dans le Leicestershire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stoke-on-Trent, dans le Staffordshire.Tony profite dune visite à Coalbrookdale, le lieu où des techniques innovantes ont ete developpees, marquant le debut de la revolution industrielle. De son côte, le passionne de voitures Jimmy soffre un tour sur le circuit historique de Donington.La grande finale aux enchères comprend un moment de chant en groupe unique en son genre. Mais quel maestro musical remportera la victoire ?

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: There are few artists who, during their lifetime, prepare the posterity of their work with meticulousness, secrecy and determination. The symbolist painter Gustave Moreau, born in 1826, is one of them. In this museum that he created with his hand, his paintings are available to us, more than a century after his death, and tell us the story of a tormented and enigmatic man, borrowed from a mysticism that will one of the most important painters of the Symbolist movement.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Le Rendez-vous du dimanche
programme.desc: On the first Sunday of each month, Museum TV focuses on an artist, a work of art, or an artistic movement. In March, we celebrate women in art!

programme.title: Vasarely, the illusionist
programme.desc: As a visual artist, painter and theorist, Vasarely was determined to challenge the art of the easel and develop an art form that was "in tune with the times" and aimed at the widest possible audience. In his quest for "functional" art, he wanted his new kinetic plastic art to help beautify the city and thereby transform society. Today, he remains the celebrated inventor of Op art.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.sub-title: Charlety, a stadium in the city
programme.desc: Decouvrez un bâtiment de l’architecture classique, moderne ou contemporaine avec une « leçons d’architecture » conjuguant rigueur, plaisir et intelligence. Au stade Charlety, les architectes ont reussi à concilier les contraires : la grandeur monumentale du stade avec celle du quartier, la vie d’une cite sportive avec celle des bureaux. Situe à la porte de Gentilly à Paris, coince entre le peripherique et le boulevard des Marechaux, le stade Charlety est borde des pavillons de la Cite universitaire, d’un cimetière et de HLM en briques rouges. Sur ce site difficile de huit hectares, marque par les cinquante ans d’histoire de l’ancien stade Sebastien-Charlety, Henri Gaudin et son fils Bruno ont su implanter le volume massif d’un stade de 20 000 places couvertes, ainsi que les equipements sportifs et les bureaux commandes par la Ville de Paris. En concevant ce grand stade avec sa forme d’anneau gigantesque, ses gradins en ellipse et sa toiture aerienne, les architectes ont su traduire l’e.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Cree à la fin du XIXe siècle par le collectionneur Richard Wallace, ce musee prive de Londres conserve une très belle collection de peintures europeennes. On peut entre autres y admirer Le cavalier riant de Frans Hals ou le Portrait de Titus, le fils de Rembrandt. La peinture française du XVIIIe siècle dans sa veine galante et rococo y est particulièrement bien representee avec, bien sûr, le chef-d’œuvre de la peinture libertine de Fragonard, Les hasards heureux de l’escarpolette.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Between 1883 and 1926 Claude Monet lived in a house at Giverny where he created a flower garden and a water garden, which provided the inspiration for his series of paintings known as the “Water Lilies”. The “Water-Lily Pond” portrays this garden, with its water lilies and the Japanese bridge in the background. In the series of eight large canvases on the theme, housed in the Musee de l’Orangerie in Paris, Monet introduces variations in light according to the hour of the day.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Au 16ème siècle, le cardinal Scipione Borghèse, neveu du Pape, fait construire une villa pour accueillir specialement sa collection privee d’œuvres d’art, l’une des plus importantes de l’epoque. Achetee par l’Etat italien en 1902, cette collection d’une immense richesse rassemble des chefs d’œuvres inestimables signes par les plus grands artistes. Decouvrez ainsi l’une des copies de Leda et le cygne de De Vinci ou le David de Caravage. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Richard Rogers and Renzo Piano, to meet the challenge posed to the architects, designed a building in the form of a giant Meccano, which immediately stood out in the Parisian architectural landscape. The architectural project, as described in the competition rules, had to meet the requirements of multidisciplinarity, free movement and open exhibition spaces. This competition was won by two young architects, the Italian Renzo Piano and the Briton Richard Rogers, by proposing a building in the spirit of libertarian architecture characteristic of the 1960s. The load-bearing structure and circulation, the escalator caterpillar for example, are rejected outside, leaving all the space for museum and activity spaces. Moored to the outside on the east façade, and used as cladding for the structure, the technical ducts stand out in four colors: blue for air, green for fluids, yellow for electrical ducts and red for circulation. The transparency of the main facade to the west allows observation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entouree de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingredients pour creer un mythe sont tous reunis. Beneficiant d’un accès complet et sans precedent aux tresors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes preferes du monde et la collection riche et unique du musee. Decouvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand ecran pendant que quelques invites y compris les conservateurs de renommee mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interpretations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Leader of the School of Pont-Aven, Paul Gauguin, the most exotic of French artists, paved the way for modern painting. There were two main themes which marked his work: Brittany and Tahiti. A rebel, he rejected copying reality in favour of exploring more delicate painting techniques. You will discover here the most important milestones in his work: from “Four Breton Girls” to “Tahitian Women on the Beach”, by way of the surprising “Self Portrait with Yellow Christ”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Caspar David Friedrich (1774-1840) est un peintre romantique allemand qui s’est surtout concentre sur l’art du paysage, qu’il traite avec une touche minutieuse. Il a ete redecouvert à la fin du XIXe s. De caractère melancolique, il a peuple ses toiles de figures humaines de dos, contemplant l’immensite de la nature, comme son très celèbre Voyageur au-dessus de la mer de nuages de Hambourg ou ses Falaises de craie à Rugen. Observez ses superbes paysages aux tons crepusculaires.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Après 7 ans de grands travaux, le château de Chinon rouvre ses portes aux visiteurs. Cette forteresse royale est un haut lieu de l’histoire europeenne. C’est au cœur de la guerre de Cent ans que Jeanne D’arc à rencontrer Charles VII dans le château de Chinon. Les travaux acheves, la forteresse royale de Chinon offre un parcours de visite surprenant qui propose de nombreux dispositifs interactifs. Les logis royaux restaures accueillent un parcours spectaculaire. Des films sont projetes de manière originale et novatrice dans quatre salles dites « d’immersion ». Avec plus de 5 millions de visiteurs annuels qui genèrent des milliers d’emplois permanents, les châteaux de la Loire sont un pôle historique, attractif et perenne classe par l’UNESCO.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Le château de Saumur est perche sur un tertre qui surplombe la ville. Ses hautes tours chapeautees et sevères dominent la Loire et ses remparts creneles abritent toute l’histoire du dernier millenaire : dix siècles de guerre et de paix. Aujourd’hui, la demesure de cette fantasmagorie de pierres est au cœur d’une logique sociale, economique, et touristique. Passant d’un bord à l’autre de ces deux mondes qui se frequentent et s’interpenètrent surtout à l’occasion des fetes medievales et des spectacles de cavalerie, le château de Saumur est un monument-phare de la cite, un pivot de la fierte commune qui favorise les rencontres conviviales et le developpement de toute une economie touristique.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans l’Ouest de la banlieue parisienne, nous allons à la decouverte de l’atelier de l’artiste Jerôme Zonder. Depuis plus de 10 ans, l’artiste developpe un travail virtuose centre sur le dessin. Realises au fusain ou à la mine de graphite, ses œuvres sombres et souvent très realistes suscitent à la fois admiration et effroi. Puissant et complexe, l’art de Jerôme Zonder captive par ses prouesses techniques et questionne notre rapport à la violence.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we meet Cheryl Dunn, photographer. After moving to New York City in the mid-1980s, she spent much of her career photographing the citys streets and the people who made their mark on them. In the late 1990s, she began to focus on film, creating classic films about artists of her generation who influenced the realities of urban life through their own work.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Au cœur de la ville d’Amboise, on retrouve le château appartenant à la Fondation Saint Louis, heritière de Louis Philippe, de ses enfants et petits-enfants. Il accueille quelques 400 000 visiteurs par an venant de tous les pays du monde, attires par les noms de Leonard de Vinci, François Ier, Catherine de Medicis... Amboise a developpe une activite touristique liee au château ; en resonnance avec la vie quotidienne. Le château fait aussi d’Amboise un lieu de reconciliation et de pèlerinage musulman en l’honneur du chef soufi. Decouvrez les coulisses de la vie au château et autour du château, avec les petits bonheurs, les soucis et les aventures quotidiennes de ses guides interprètes et gardiens, jardiniers et paysagistes, historiens et architectes.

programme.title: The Real Thing - Real Life in a Copycat World
programme.desc: Sixty Eiffel towers, a dozen of Great Pyramids of Giza, thirty leaning towers of Pisa, over eighty copies of the White House… Architecture doppelgangers are multiplying all over the world. Between lucrative investments, architectural piracy, and modern tourism, each of these places expresses an aspect of how our planet is being transformed through globalization. Do these places have something in common? How different are they from copies of the past? Are they more than just copies?

programme.title: Women Sculptors, neither muse nor model
programme.desc: For very long time, women were excluded from doing sculpture. Yet, they never gave up struggling for their recognition as artists. As Women Painters, this one-off recounts the fate of the first female sculptors, and showcases their works, that are at last being acknowledged today...

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Antonio Canal, known as Canaletto, and Francesco Guardi are the best known 18th century painters of the urban Venetian landscape. In minute detail, they painted iconic views of the Venetian Republic, destined for rich foreign visitors. “Maria della Salute from the Grand Canal in Venice” by Canaletto and “Venice: Piazza San Marco” by Guardi followed this trend. Later Venice also inspired Paul Signac’s “The Green Veil, Venice”. Go on a voyage of discovery...Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Georges Seurat. You will discover his labour with « Ile de France » landscape, Study for « a Sunday afternoon at the grande jatte », Study for « La grande jatte ».

programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

Faites rayonner la lumière de votre cœur en apprenant à respirer avec ampleur. Cette pratique encourage une action guidee par des intentions d’amour, de pardon et de gratitude.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on a full-body workout using a chair as the main tool. Guillaume and Sabrina guide viewers through simple yet effective exercises like squats, leg raises, and glute-strengthening moves. They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Strong, Slow and Steady: Hand Balancing and Hip Opening
programme.desc: Arrive at your practice, prepared to be where you are. Strong, Slow and Steady moves you through that everchallenging Crow Pose, while guiding you to the realization that you cannot fail to be where you already are. Leave your conception perfect behind as you explore this awakening sequence.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a complete lower-body strengthening session. After a warm-up, they move on to targeted exercises for the thighs, abs, and glutes. Squats, lunges, and lateral raises are on the program to build strength and tone your body.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga

Faites rayonner la lumière de votre cœur en apprenant à respirer avec ampleur. Cette pratique encourage une action guidee par des intentions d’amour, de pardon et de gratitude.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, its the turn of Mickaël, 43, to enter the competition. From Vierzon, in the province of Namur, our man is a fan of decoration. In everyday life, he sells window frames. Mickaël has his own vision of decoration. So weve been warned, Mickaël has no intention of taking the easy way out. Except that our decorator still have to pay attention to the needs of the owners, Alice and Julien.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the fourth day of competition, its Anouchka, from Rhode-Saint-Genèse, who enters the arena. For as long as she can remember, decorating has been part of the life of this bubbly 45-year-old mum. A few years ago, Anouchka turned to painting and jewellery design. Professions that bring her closer to interior design, her real passion. To prove it she’ll have to stand out from the crowd. And what is our decorators trademark?

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: One at a time, Cedric, Anouchka, Mickaël and Melissa went to a private home to redecorate a room based on the theme “like a garden”. This week, Valerie Damidot gave them the challenge of redecorating a living room to include the set object: A footstool! Today, its time for the verdict. All four projects have been completed. The contestants will now face their opponents criticisms.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cest à Giverny que demarre le voyage de Julie, celui dont le nom resonne immediatement comme le berceau de l’Impressionnisme a garde une authenticite emouvante, Giverny impose son style, murmure son histoire. Sa notoriete est fortement liee à la presence historique de Claude Monet et à tous les fabuleux temoins laisses par ce dernier. Claude Monet a aussi laisse son empreinte dans la cuisine à Giverny. Ses carnets de recettes sont là pour en temoigner. C’est dans ces carnets que Julie va s’inspirer pour remplir le sien, au menu : Lapin en compote, feuillete d’andouilles au camembert, et charlottes aux abricots.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cap au Nord pour decouvrir une ville française absolument incontournable : Lille. Cette ville possède un patrimoine architectural exceptionnel, marchande dès le Moyen Age, citadelle sous Louis XIV, industrielle au XIXe...elle sagrandit au cours des siècles. Julie ira à la rencontre de ceux qui participent à la renommee de la ville et de la region, et à travers son patrimoine culinaire avec au menu de ce voyage : la recette du coq à la bière, celle du hochepot, et sur une note sucree, une crème brûlee à la chicoree. .

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Pays dAuge is the beating heart of Normandy. Honfleur with its picturesque port, the Basilica of Lisieux, a major pilgrimage site, and the Haras du Pin, the cradle of horse breeding, illustrate the diversity of this land of traditions, where craftsmanship and gastronomy reign supreme.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Re and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Sequence joyeuse et elegante, "Grace et Gratitude" ouvre l’avant du corps avec une serie d’extensions dynamiques vers l’arrière. programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, its the turn of Mickaël, 43, to enter the competition. From Vierzon, in the province of Namur, our man is a fan of decoration. In everyday life, he sells window frames. Mickaël has his own vision of decoration. So weve been warned, Mickaël has no intention of taking the easy way out. programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the fourth day of competition, its Anouchka, from Rhode-Saint-Genèse, who enters the arena. programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Pour mieux comprendre le rôle de ces montagnes explosives disseminees un peu partout sur la terre ou sous les oceans, Yann Arthus-Bertrand sest rendu en Italie, pays qui compte le plus grand nombre de volcans en activite dEurope. Accompagne du volcanologue Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, le photographe est alle à la rencontre de ceux qui ont choisi de vivre avec « leur » volcan, malgre les dangers que cette cohabitation comporte.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training features an intense cardio workout. Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a series of exercises, including high knees, lunges, and lateral movements. The focus is on endurance and energy burn, with dynamic moves engaging the entire body. As always, they emphasize the importance of warming up and staying hydrated for a safe session. Get ready to sweat and boost your cardio in a fun and motivating atmosphere!

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reconnect and Refine: Hip Opening and Abdominal Strengthening
programme.desc: Connect with the essence of your being with Reconnect and Refine. This exhilarating sequence encourages you to find comfort in the present moment, and let go of preconceived expectations or agendas. It is not about where you are going, but where you are.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Pays dAuge is the beating heart of Normandy. Honfleur with its picturesque port, the Basilica of Lisieux, a major pilgrimage site, and the Haras du Pin, the cradle of horse breeding, illustrate the diversity of this land of traditions, where craftsmanship and gastronomy reign supreme.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Re and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana accueille Heloïse Brion, creatrice de "Miss Maggies Kitchen

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo offers a recipe for celeriac risotto with citrus powder. She will also prepare black rice with spring vegetables. A real treat for the taste buds!

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Discover an Italian culinary staple: ravioli. Luana Belmondo, accompanied by her son Alessandro, makes her recipe for ricotta arugula ravioli with artichoke and almond sauce. The duo also prepare choco ravioli stuffed with pistachio custard and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en storslått reise til et av verdens villeste og farligste landskaper: det sub-tropiske skogsområdet i Afrika. Her finnes noen av kontinentets mest velkjente kjemper. En antikk verden med ekstreme forhold som danner bakteppe for kampene mellom rovdyr og byttedyr.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Den enorme Kalahariørkenen strekker seg over 900 000 kvadratkilometer. Det er et tørt og øde landskap der sommerregnet fører til en eksplosjon av liv inntil jorden tar til seg alt vannet. Et vakkert sted med mange undre og store kontraster, der dyrene har tilpasset seg på en helt unik måte for å kunne overleve.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: Samiske reingjetere og naturvernere samarbeider for å redde en av Europas villeste grenseland. Gjennom is og snø dannes en ny kobling mellom mennesket og villmarken.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en storslått reise til et av verdens villeste og farligste landskaper: det sub-tropiske skogsområdet i Afrika. Her finnes noen av kontinentets mest velkjente kjemper. En antikk verden med ekstreme forhold som danner bakteppe for kampene mellom rovdyr og byttedyr.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: Samiske reingjetere og naturvernere samarbeider for å redde en av Europas villeste grenseland. Gjennom is og snø dannes en ny kobling mellom mennesket og villmarken.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land Of Leopards
programme.desc: I viltreservatet Mashatu i Botswana, et av de siste fristedene for frittgående leoparder, føder en mor to unger. Hun vil gjøre alt for å beskytte dem. Men når klimaendringer strammer grepet, forsvinner ressurser, og en tøff leopardkrig er i emming. Denne filmen er basert på tre år med nøye observasjon, og avdekker sjeldne og utrolige bilder av oppførsel som ikke tidligere har blitt dokumentert, og tilbyr et helt nytt innblikk i motstandsdyktigheten og hemmelighetene til denne sky arten.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Det er vinter på gården, og Pol-familien bringer inn fler til flokken deres! Familien henter inn fire merinosøyer som nylig ble avlet opp, noe som betyr at med litt flaks kan gården vente sine første lam til våren. Og etter hvert som vinter går over til vår, forbereder Pol-familien seg på de nyankomne ved å bygge en lammebås. I mellomtiden sjekker Beth om biene hennes overlevde vinteren.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Pol-familien må skynde seg med å forberede gården sin til dens første Michigan-vinter. Familien blir superdriftig for å fikse beitegjerdet og bygge ferdig hagen før den første snøen faller. Beth er bekymret for biene, så hun henter inn litt eksperthjelp for å forhåpentligvis sikre at de overlever.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Det er vinter for præriehundene i New Mexico. Carl og ungene forbereder seg på å gå i hi, men en uventet allianse mellom rovdyrene i området har satt villhundene i stor fare.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.sub-title: Den gode, den onde og den kosete
programme.desc: Endelig har man varmt vær i nordre New Mexico, og det betyr at paringstiden er i gang. På slettene må Furgie kjempe mot Brutus igjen om retten til å pare seg med en tispe i alfahundens territorium.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Den svarte mambaen er blant verdens mest fryktede slanger. Men bak den uberegnelige adferden og de raske angrepene, finnes det en tilbakeholden og intelligent skapning som bare prøver å overleve den glovarme sommeren. Den legendariske giftslangen har et stort arsenal; gift, bevegelighet, hurtighet og svært gode sanser. Dette gjør at den behersker landskapet godt selv om den er den mest forhatte giftslangen i Afrika.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Selv om de fleste dyreforeldre er kjent for å være veldig overbeskyttende, finner Ryan Reynolds noen absurde foreldrestrategier hos dyrerikets absolutt verste foreldre. Fra gjess som legger egg på toppen av en klippe, til koalamødre som forer barna med bæsj. Disse foreldrene oppdrar barna sine på en helt egen måte.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Pula, leopardlederen over kongerikets mørke hjerte, står overfor en tøff avgjørelse mellom ekte kjærlighet og arven hennes. Når Pula føder Motshidi, er det hennes siste sjanse for et dynasti. Blue Eyes, Motshidis far, er ikke til å stole på. Han har tidligere drept unger. Pula må beskytte og trene Motshidi til å ta sin rettmessige plass i kongeriket mens Pulas helsetilstand forverres.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Den svarte mambaen er blant verdens mest fryktede slanger. Men bak den uberegnelige adferden og de raske angrepene, finnes det en tilbakeholden og intelligent skapning som bare prøver å overleve den glovarme sommeren. Den legendariske giftslangen har et stort arsenal; gift, bevegelighet, hurtighet og svært gode sanser. Dette gjør at den behersker landskapet godt selv om den er den mest forhatte giftslangen i Afrika.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Selv om de fleste dyreforeldre er kjent for å være veldig overbeskyttende, finner Ryan Reynolds noen absurde foreldrestrategier hos dyrerikets absolutt verste foreldre. Fra gjess som legger egg på toppen av en klippe, til koalamødre som forer barna med bæsj. Disse foreldrene oppdrar barna sine på en helt egen måte.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds beviser at kun fordi de er underdogs, betyr ikke det at de ikke er med i gamet. Fra forkledningens mester, sargassoulken, og den rompebitende sjakalen, til flerhodede larver som er lokkeduer, og smarte makaker som lurer uvitende turister. Disse mesterne i bedrag gjennomfører de største svindlene i dyreriket.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Gjør deg klar til litt liv og røre! Fra brautende fugler til vonde hover, setter veterinærene i gang med å helbrede poter, kjever, til og med dun på lykkeanden hans. Dyrlegene fører en episk kamp for å redde en ku som sliter med å føde, dr. Lisa behandler en husky som har blitt påkjørt av en lastebil, og dr. Nicole undersøker et valpekull som har mange problemer. Polerne ønsker velkommen til sin nyeste pelsbaby, Christy, en vilter bengalsk kattunge.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Den elskede klinikk-huskatten, Tater, blir syk og teamet jobber sammen for å redde ham. Charles debuterer med en ny stil, dr. Pol behandler en stut som elsker å tygge ved og dr. Brenda tar seg av en labrador med mageproblemer. En nysgjerrig chihuahua spiser en giftig matbit, så dr. Lisa gir en den klissete motgift og dr. Nicole hopper inn for å redde en fødende geitemama.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Når en syk hund knapt kan gå, er PVS-veterinærene på saken.

programme.title: Slangenes overraskelser
programme.desc: Slangene er noen fantastiske rovdyr med spennende adferd og utrolige ferdigheter. Og de er viktigere enn man kanskje tror.

programme.title: Kongekobraens hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Vi ser på det hemmelige livet til kongekobraen og finner ut hvordan mennesker håper å kunne sikre at denne legendariske slangen overlever.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Den svarte mambaen er blant verdens mest fryktede slanger. Men bak den uberegnelige adferden og de raske angrepene, finnes det en tilbakeholden og intelligent skapning som bare prøver å overleve den glovarme sommeren. Den legendariske giftslangen har et stort arsenal; gift, bevegelighet, hurtighet og svært gode sanser. Dette gjør at den behersker landskapet godt selv om den er den mest forhatte giftslangen i Afrika.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Giftslangene er blant de mest fryktede slangeartene i verden. Nå avslører deres historier hvor tøft livet kan være for de forhatte slangene. Klapperslangene i ørkenen er et mål for både rovdyr og mennesker. Hvesehuggormer fjerner skadedyr, men blir allikevel forfulgt. Gabonviperen på skogbunnen våger ikke å røre på seg. Vi tar en nærmere titt på hva de står overfor og hvordan de takler utfordringene med sine unike egenskaper.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: De blir elsket av enkelte, men fryktet av de fleste. Kobraslangene er kjent som kraftfulle og legendariske. Vi får se kannibalistiske kobraer i India, ørkenspesialister som jakter på fugler i Kalahari og skogkobraer som forfølger padder i sumpen i Afrika. Hver av dem har en unik historie og sine egne utfordringer.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes
programme.desc: Helt siden oldtiden har mennesker hatt et brokete forhold til slanger. På tvers av Amerika og Australia huser ulike habitater giftige hoggormer og kraftfulle kvelerslanger, som alle har utviklet seg til å tilpasse seg sin nisje. I Amerika holder over 30 ulike typer klapperslanger gnagerbestanden under kontroll, og bevarer økosystemer. Mens i Australia skjuler korallrevene enda farligere sjøslanger og den sky og ekstremt giftige kysttaipanen. Fra frodige skoger til ørkensanden huser disse kontinentene en skjult verden av noen av de mest dødelige, fascinerende og hemmelighetsfulle slangene.

programme.title: Ti farligste slanger
programme.desc: Fra Rio Grande til mektige Amazonas; i Brasil finnes det mange farlige slanger. Nigel ser nærmere på motgiften som blir brukt om man blir bitt.

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: Slanger i Afrika blir rangert fra minst til mest dødelig. I Afrika er mambaer og kobraer farlige og dødelige, men med pytoner, huggormer og verdens giftigste snoker lagt til i miksen, er det mange flere uventede kandidater som kjemper om tittelen om å være dødeligst.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes
programme.desc: Helt siden oldtiden har mennesker hatt et brokete forhold til slanger. På tvers av Amerika og Australia huser ulike habitater giftige hoggormer og kraftfulle kvelerslanger, som alle har utviklet seg til å tilpasse seg sin nisje. Vi tar en nærmere titt på hva de står overfor og hvordan de takler utfordringene med sine unike egenskaper.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: På et dypdykk i Australias hav leter Phil Breslin etter de ville dyrene som dominerer undervannsverdenen. Først finner han en jeger som er bygget som en torpedo og utstyrt med dolker – tigerhaien. Så dykker Phil med en gruppe grasiøse djevelskater, og får høre en serenade fra verdens største skapning, den majestetiske knølhvalen.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land Of Leopards
programme.desc: I viltreservatet Mashatu i Botswana, et av de siste fristedene for frittgående leoparder, føder en mor to unger. Hun vil gjøre alt for å beskytte dem. Men når klimaendringer strammer grepet, forsvinner ressurser, og en tøff leopardkrig er i emming. Denne filmen er basert på tre år med nøye observasjon, og avdekker sjeldne og utrolige bilder av oppførsel som ikke tidligere har blitt dokumentert, og tilbyr et helt nytt innblikk i motstandsdyktigheten og hemmelighetene til denne sky arten.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Spekkhoggere har lenge fascinert vitenskapsmenn på grunn av sin utrolige intelligens. Men nylige angrep på båter nær Gibraltar gjør at mange stiller spørsmål ved hvorvidt vi kjenner disse majestetiske vesenene. Vi tar en titt på innsiden av spekkhoggernes verden for å avsløre hvordan de utnytter havets rikdom perfekt, skaper “mote” og opprettholder kompleks familiestruktur. Fortalt av sanger og spekkhoggerentusiast Sarah Connor.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Præriehundenes leder, Furgie, tar jobben litt for alvorlig og utfordrer en plagsom tyv selv om hans gravide kone, June, protesterer.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: På slettene vil Furgie hjelpe den gravide enken etter kampen mot Brutus.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: En mors kjærlighet blir satt på prøve da Pula må forlate ungen alene i kongeriket.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis følger en hunnbjørn med to unger som skal ta den farlige ferden over isen, før de stilles overfor enda større utfordringer.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Under ledelse av den hensynsløse kommandanten tar en klan med hyener makten fra løvene.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: En mors kjærlighet blir satt på prøve da Pula må forlate ungen alene i kongeriket.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis følger en hunnbjørn med to unger som skal ta den farlige ferden over isen, før de stilles overfor enda større utfordringer.

programme.title: Vill vinter
programme.desc: Å overleve i skogene nord i Finland er et kappløp mot årstidene, med sin grove villmark og ekstreme klima. Vi følger det utrolige dagliglivet til en brunbjørnmor som risikerer alt for å oppdra ungene sine. Hun kommer ut av vinterdvalen tynn og sliten, og må lede ungene gjennom en kort sommer der mat – og overlevelse – er det eneste på prioriteringslisten.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Marinbiolog Florian Graner drar til Salishhavet for å se på den bemerkelsesverdige læringsoppførselen til spekkhoggerne. Vi går inn i verdenen til disse hvite og svarte kjempene, og ser på deres evne til å videreformidle kunnskap gjennom generasjoner. Fortalt av sanger og spekkhoggerentusiast Sarah Connor.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Under ledelse av den hensynsløse kommandanten tar en klan med hyener makten fra løvene.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: De har blitt fanget av tidevannet, og Dikeledi må vise ungene hvordan de skal klare seg.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Etter drapet på en av deres egne er flokken med villhunder på jakt etter en ny leder.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Mmamotse har snudd kongeriket på hodet. Flokken er på ville veier, og det blir opptil prinsessen å ta vare på arven etter henne.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: En mors kjærlighet blir satt på prøve da Pula må forlate ungen alene i kongeriket.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol kjemper en kamp mot klokka for å redde en ku. En rekke krisetilfeller gjør dr. Pol opptatt på gårdene, mens veterinærteamet tar hånd om klinikken. Dr. Nicole blir tilkalt for å undersøke et reinsdyr, dr. Lisa fjerner en mistenkelig kul på en gjeterhund og dr. Brenda behandler en valp som har rast ned i vekt.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Veterinærene er på farten fra morgen til kveld. Dr. Pol kjemper for å redde en kalv og moren, mens dr. Nicole må sy to ender som ble skadet i et angrep samt en hund som fikk revet opp øret. Dr. Lisa undersøker et uvanlig poteproblem, mens røntgenbilder viser at en chihuahua har et uvanlig problem i brystet. Alt inngår i en dag ved Pols veterinærklinikk.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne bruker humor og andre avstressende teknikker for å håndtere de risikofylte utfordringene ved å hjelpe en rotte som har blitt angrepet av en hund, fjerne et sprukket egg fra en vakker fugl og redde en hund fra en livstruende tilstand. De har også litt lettere oppdrag, som en valps første undersøkelse, en katt som mister pels, et marsvin med et klor i øyet, en forstoppet skilpadde og en kjønnsavsløringsfest for en skjeggagam.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Veterinærene hos Dyrefikserne ser til mange av menneskets beste venner, og hele teamet må bidra når en fransk bulldog må ha et hastekeisersnitt. En hund har blitt påkjørt, flere chow-chow-er har synsproblemer, og de må behandle en liten valp med en overraskende stor apetitt. Dr. Hodges og Dr. Ferguson viser at de setter pris på dyrlegeassistentene med en dag fylt med moro.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: En mors kjærlighet blir satt på prøve da Pula må forlate ungen alene i kongeriket.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
